call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. Yeah, I was just looking at options. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. That's, uh, based on the information you provided. What are you hoping to use the funds for, if you don't mind me asking? 
Eleanor: I'm planning a kitchen renovation. It's… it's been a long time coming. 
Agent: Fantastic! A kitchen renovation is a great investment. Now, with this loan, you'd have fixed monthly payments over, say, a five-year term. We can adjust that, of course. The total cost, including interest, would be… let me just calculate… around $19,300. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, that's… a little more than I was hoping for. 
Agent: I understand. We can explore different terms to lower the monthly payment, but it will increase the total interest paid. Or, we could look at a slightly smaller loan amount. 
Eleanor: Maybe $8,000? 
Agent: Let me check… Yes, absolutely. An $8,000 Personal Loan at 8.99% would have monthly payments of approximately $155 for five years. Total cost would be around $9,300. 
Eleanor: That sounds much better. 
Agent: Excellent! So, we can proceed with the application process. It's all done online, very quick and easy. Do you have your driver's license and social security number handy? 
Eleanor: Yes, I do. Okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I'm on a fixed income! 
Agent: Well, sir, it depends on your credit score… 
Robert: (Hangs up abruptly)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a Personal Loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark from GreenTech said you guys were good. I'm looking at consolidating some debt. 
Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. Now, what kind of debt are we looking to consolidate? 
Jessica: Credit card debt, mostly. About $12,000. 
Agent: Okay, great. So, consolidating that into a Personal Loan at 12.5% would give you a fixed monthly payment, making budgeting much easier. The total repayment over five years would be… approximately $28,000. 
Jessica: Wow, that's… a lot. I was hoping for something lower. 
Agent: I understand. We can explore different loan terms. A seven-year term would lower your monthly payments, but you'd pay more in interest overall. Or, we could adjust the loan amount to better fit your budget. 
Jessica: What about fees? Are there origination fees or anything like that? 
Agent: Yes, there's a one-time origination fee of 1% of the loan amount, so $150 in your case. There are no prepayment penalties, though. 
Jessica: Hmm. I've heard some companies have hidden fees. 
Agent: We pride ourselves on transparency, Jessica. Everything is clearly outlined in the loan agreement. We can send you a copy to review before you make any decisions. 
Jessica: Okay, that sounds good. What's the APR, including the fees? 
Agent: The APR is 13.2%. 
Jessica: Okay. I need to think about it. I'm also looking at a couple of other options. 
Agent: Absolutely. I can send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms and a comparison chart with other lenders. Would you like that emailed to you? 
Jessica: Yes, please. That would be helpful.

Agent: Hello, Michael? This is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, yeah, I did. Just checking out my options. 
Agent: Great! We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with a credit limit of $5,000 at an interest rate of 17.99%. It comes with rewards points on all purchases. 
Michael: 17.99%? That's pretty high, isn't it? 
Agent: It is a bit higher, but it's based on your credit profile. However, you can improve your rate by making on-time payments. 
Michael: I already have a couple of cards. I'm not sure I need another one. 
Agent: This card offers a 2% cashback on all purchases, which could save you money in the long run. Plus, it has fraud protection and a convenient mobile app. 
Michael: Hmm. I appreciate the information, but I think I'll pass for now. I'm just not really looking to open another credit card right now. 
Agent: Okay, no problem at all. If you change your mind, feel free to contact us. Have a great day!

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%. 
Patricia: 24.99?! That's a rip-off! And I told you, I don't want a loan! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: We… uh… it's a marketing list. 
Patricia: Well, take me off your list! I want to file a complaint! This is harassment! 
Agent: Ma'am, I understand your frustration… 
Patricia: No, you don't! Just don't call me again! (Hangs up)
